---
title: "Gnanesh Reddy"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: images/profile.jpg
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 14em
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/gnaneshreddy16
      target: _blank
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/gnaneshreddy16-tech
      target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:gnanesh.reddy2@mail.dcu.ie
---

## Welcome

I am Gnanesh Reddy, a Business Analytics postgraduate student at **Dublin City University**, passionate about transforming raw data into actionable business insights. My work sits at the intersection of financial data, statistical modelling, and clear communication.

```{=html}
<p>
<img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Python-3776AB?style=flat&logo=python&logoColor=white" alt="Python">
<img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/pandas-150458?style=flat&logo=pandas&logoColor=white" alt="Pandas">
<img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Plotly-3F4F75?style=flat&logo=plotly&logoColor=white" alt="Plotly">
<img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Git-F05032?style=flat&logo=git&logoColor=white" alt="Git">
<img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Quarto-75AADB?style=flat&logo=quarto&logoColor=white" alt="Quarto">
</p>
```

---

::: {.panel-tabset}

## For Recruiters

I am immediately available for **data analyst** and **business intelligence** roles. My projects demonstrate hands-on experience with Python, financial modelling, and interactive data visualisation.

**What I bring:**

| Skill | Evidence |
|---|---|
| Python (pandas, Plotly) | Three live projects with executable code |
| Financial Analytics | Stock market trend analysis with risk/return modelling |
| Business Intelligence | Sales revenue analysis with forecasting |
| Machine Learning | Customer segmentation using K-means clustering |
| Version Control | Full Git history with descriptive commits |
| Communication | This portfolio — built from scratch with Quarto |

[Download CV](cv/cv.pdf){target="_blank" .btn .btn-primary}
[View Projects](projects/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}

## For Academic Readers

This portfolio documents my MSc journey at Dublin City University, covering technical skill development in Python, Git, Quarto, and statistical analysis. It serves as both a learning record and a professional showcase.

**Module Learning Outcomes Demonstrated:**

- Reproducible analysis using Quarto and executable Python chunks
- Version-controlled development with meaningful Git commit history
- Web publishing via GitHub Pages with custom SCSS theming
- Critical reflection on skill development and professional growth

[Read Reflection](reflection.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[About Me](about.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}

:::

---

::: {.callout-note}
## Currently Open to Opportunities
I am actively looking for data analyst and business intelligence roles in Ireland. Feel free to [get in touch](contact.qmd).
:::
